svg.title: Anatomy of a JavaScript object — all parts labeled
svg.desc: Shows curly braces key colon value and comma with color coded labels and leader lines

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What do curly braces mean in a JavaScript object?')
g.text: marks the start and end of object

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is a key in a JavaScript object?')
sendPrompt('What does the colon do in a JavaScript object?')
sendPrompt('What can a value be in a JavaScript object?')
g.text: any data type: string, number, bool…

g.onclick: sendPrompt('When do you need a comma in a JavaScript object?')

svg.text: string · number · boolean · array · another object · function
